title: MonetDB memory keeps on increasing and will result in crash when a lot of queries are sent to monetdb from a single connection
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE rc_event(roe_type BIGINT, dc_servername VARCHAR(50), roe_start_datetime TIMESTAMP, resources_used_vmem DOUBLE, resource_list_vmem DOUBLE, roe_source_id VARCHAR(120), walltime_splitt BIGINT, ncpu_walltime BIGINT, custom_resource_1 BIGINT, custom_resource_2 BIGINT, custom_resource_3 BIGINT, custom_resource_4 BIGINT, custom_resource_5 BIGINT);

INSERT INTO rc_event(roe_type, dc_servername, roe_start_datetime, resources_used_vmem, resource_list_vmem, roe_source_id, walltime_splitt, ncpu_walltime, custom_resource_1) VALUES (1, 'server1', '2023-10-01 10:00:00', 1024.5, 2048.0, 'source1', 3600, 4, NULL);

INSERT INTO rc_event(roe_type, dc_servername, roe_start_datetime, resources_used_vmem, resource_list_vmem, roe_source_id, walltime_splitt, ncpu_walltime, custom_resource_2) VALUES (2, 'server2', '2023-10-01 11:00:00', NULL, 4096.0, 'source2', 7200, 8, 100);
SELECT AVG(resources_used_vmem) FROM rc_event WHERE roe_type IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE rc_event SET resources_used_vmem = resources_used_vmem * 1.1 WHERE dc_servername = 'server1';
key_bug_features: High memory usage from multiple queries on single connection
